title: CommittedEventEnvelope
description: Transport/storage envelope for every committed event. The `payload` is validated separately against the schema named by `type`.

globalSeq.description: Per-shard monotonic VISIBLE sequence assigned at commit (see spec 8.1). Cross-stream ordering holds only within a shard.

streamSeq.description: Per-stream sequence; basis of optimistic concurrency via UNIQUE(stream_id, stream_seq).

type.description: Event type, must match a catalog entry.
